title: Sly Cooper and the Thievius Raccoonus Gameplay Map

subject.name: Sly Cooper and the Thievius Raccoonus

narrative.description: Sucker Punch's cel-shaded stealth platformer follows Sly's ancestor heists across comic-book world hubs.
narrative.core_loop: Stealth through heist worlds, collect clue bottles, learn ancestor moves, and defeat Clockwerk.

mechanics.map_notes: Core stealth platforming hybrid defines Sly Cooper and the Thievius Raccoonus stage design.

mechanics.map_notes: Sly Cooper and the Thievius Raccoonus uses collectathon token gating for world structure.
